recent_excerpts: CISA added 4 actively exploited vulnerabilities to its KEV catalog — SimpleHelp, Samsung MagicINFO 9, and D-Link DIR-823X — with a May 2026 federal remediation deadline.
CISA added six vulnerabilities in Fortinet, Microsoft, and Adobe software to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, warning of active in-the-wild attacks requiring urgent patching.
CISA warns that a critical SQL injection vulnerability in Fortinet products is being actively exploited, urging immediate patching. The specific CVE ID has not yet been publicly disclosed.
